mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, total_quantity, description, borrow_note, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM equipments
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, name, total_quantity, description, borrow_note, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM equipments WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO equipments (name, total_quantity, description, borrow_note) VALUES (#{name}, #{totalQuantity}, #{description}, #{borrowNote})
mapper.update: UPDATE equipments SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT eb.id) FROM equipment_bookings eb INNER JOIN equipment_booking_items ebi ON eb.id = ebi.equipment_booking_id WHERE ebi.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND eb.status IN (1, 2) AND eb.borrow_date >= CURDATE()
SELECT id, equipment_id, venue_id, rule_note, created_at, updated_at FROM equipment_venue_rules WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} ORDER BY venue_id ASC
SELECT evr.venue_id, v.name AS venue_name, evr.rule_note FROM equipment_venue_rules evr INNER JOIN venues v ON evr.venue_id = v.id WHERE evr.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} ORDER BY evr.venue_id ASC

SELECT e.id AS equipment_id, e.name AS equipment_name, e.total_quantity, active.equipment_booking_id, active.user_id, active.borrow_date, active.time_slots, active.quantity, active.purpose, active.contact_info, active.related_venue_booking_id, active.related_venue_id, active.related_venue_name FROM equipments e LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ebi.equipment_id, ebi.quantity, eb.id AS equipment_booking_id, eb.user_id, eb.borrow_date, eb.time_slots, eb.purpose, eb.contact_info, eb.related_venue_booking_id, b.venue_id AS related_venue_id, v.name AS related_venue_name FROM equipment_booking_items ebi INNER JOIN equipment_bookings eb ON ebi.equipment_booking_id = eb.id LEFT JOIN bookings b ON eb.related_venue_booking_id = b.id LEFT JOIN venues v ON b.venue_id = v.id WHERE eb.status = 2 AND eb.borrow_date = #{date} AND (eb.time_slots & #{hourMask}) != 0 ) active ON e.id = active.equipment_id WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY e.id ASC, active.equipment_booking_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO equipment_venue_rules (equipment_id, venue_id, rule_note) VALUES (#{equipmentId}, #{venueId}, #{ruleNote})
